title: NoBroker is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Senior)

jsonLd.title: NoBroker is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Join the NoBroker family as a Full Stack Developer in Ludhiana. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About NoBroker:
NoBroker is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in MongoDB

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Professional development and training programs
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Ludhiana, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with NoBroker!
